'''Thlan-sa''' was a [[Kath/Legends|Kath]] and a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. A bounty on Thlan-sa's head was claimed by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ssach'thirix]].<ref name="AIR" />
